name: kaestral
description: The AI-operated video editor for Windows. Drive a real, local, multi-track editor by prompt — cut, caption, art-direct motion, grade, and export.
long_description: Kaestral is a local, MCP-native video editor. It exposes ~50 tools an LLM can drive: on-device perception (frame vision, word-level transcription, beat/silence detection, palette extraction), a real multi-track timeline, word-level editing, bespoke art-directed motion graphics, color grading, and export to H.264/H.265/ProRes plus Premiere (XMEML) and Resolve/FCP (FCPXML). Everything runs locally — your video never leaves your machine.
